revision.comment: removed false link, not even existing as a redirect

Reverted edit by [[Special:Contribs/223.24.184.184|223.24.184.184]] ([[User talk:223.24.184.184|talk]]) to last version by 2600:1016:A010:EC43:872C:D998:1DD6:31D5
Bot: remove deleted category Pages and Categories from Wikipedia
Bot: remove deleted category String-handling templates
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6510753)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
